text: So basically Xbox connect is back?
text_zh: 所以说 Xbox Connect 卷土重来了？

text: It’s has a membership you have to pay for every month on top of paying for the device. Not really worth it when they can play the games on a iPad or tablet for free.
text_zh: 它有会员制，每个月都要另外付费，设备本身还要钱。考虑到 iPad 或平板电脑上就能免费玩游戏，真不值。

text: This is really going to get them excited and sleep better after playing
text_zh: 这真的能让他们兴奋起来，玩完之后睡得更好。

text: I’m supposed to be saving money but I waaant this 😄
text_zh: 我本来应该省钱的，但是我就是想要这个😄

text: yes all the kids love this
text_zh: 是的，所有孩子都喜欢这个

text: I so need this for my kids
text_zh: 我太需要这个给我孩子了

text: The pop up says 50% off but it’s only 20%
text_zh: 弹窗显示打五折，但实际上只有八折

text: just bought it and been playing with the kids all day this was a perfect buy just a side note if you choose to pay the 89 bucks once a year you get unlimited access to all the games I did even the cookie man game was Hella fun this is a must buy we love it 1000 percent frfr it's worth the price
text_zh: 刚买了，和孩子们玩了一整天，买得太值了，顺便说一下，如果你选择每年付 89 块钱，就能无限玩所有游戏，包括那个做饼干的游戏也超好玩，这绝对是必买的，我们爱了，1000% 真的，值这个价

text: I play it more than my Grandson. We both LOVE IT!!
text_zh: 我玩得比我孙子还多。我们俩都超爱！！

text: lol imma just put it on YouTube and make them believe they really playing lol
text_zh: 哈哈，我直接放 YouTube 上，让他们信以为真他们在玩 lol

text: Love this, HATE the subscription
text_zh: 喜欢这个，但讨厌那个订阅制

text: One a side note where’d you get those pjs those would be perfect for my sons!!!

text: Definitely made me think of the XBox Kinect
text_zh: 这绝对让我想起了 Xbox Kinect

text: Can you play just dance on this? That would be so cool!!

text: I’m about to clear my entire cart out & Have only this in it

text: Def a way to wear out the kids 😂

text: 200 for the machine plus monthly subscriptions to play fruit ninja. Straight money grab
